name: Urb-it AB (publ)
summary: Urb-it AB (publ), a platform company, provides delivery solutions to consumers and retailers in London, Paris, Lyon, Stockholm, and Gothenburg. It offers Urb-it Delivery for same day deliveries from e-Commerce; Urb-it Collect for same-day deliveries for click and collect customers; and Service First for same day deliveries from physical stores. The company was formerly known as Urb-it & Associates AB. Urb-it AB (publ) was founded in 2014 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
